title: Musk Puts Grok into Excel: Select a Block of Data and Ask About the Reason for Price Fluctuations, Charts Can Be Directly Inserted into the Table
excerpt: Musk's xAI has directly embedded its large model Grok into the core of Microsoft Office. According to multiple financial media reports on July 21, xAI has launc
content_html:
Musk's xAI has directly embedded its large model Grok into the core of Microsoft Office. According to multiple financial media reports on July 21, xAI has launched a free Microsoft 365 add-in called Grok For Excel for Microsoft Excel, which is now available on the Microsoft Marketplace and is compatible with Word and PowerPoint. This means that Grok is no longer limited to chat windows but has become a data analyst that can be easily accessed within office software.

The logic of using this add-in closely mirrors real office scenarios: when users select a data area in Excel, they can directly ask Grok about changes in the data, the reasons behind them, and the key points. Grok's answers will clearly reference the corresponding data cells, not giving conclusions out of thin air. It can also understand formula syntax, perform common editing operations such as calculating averages, sorting, and filling, and generate charts that can be inserted into the worksheet with one click. In other words, tasks that used to require writing functions, dragging formulas, and manually drawing charts can now be advanced by simply speaking to the data.

More importantly, Grok does not only focus on the small selected data in the table. Through connectors, it can extract contextual information from emails, SharePoint, or Google Drive, integrating scattered documents into the current analysis. This capability makes Excel-based Q&A no longer an isolated island but allows for more comprehensive judgments by combining email exchanges, team documents, and external files. When Grok is embedded as a free add-in into the trio of Word, PowerPoint, and Excel, the boundary between office software and conversational AI is further blurred.

content_html_zh:
马斯克的 xAI 已将其大型模型 Grok 直接嵌入到 Microsoft Office 的核心中。 据多家财经媒体 7 月 21 日报道，xAI 针对 Microsoft Excel 推出了一款名为 Grok For Excel 的免费 Microsoft 365 插件，该插件现已在 Microsoft Marketplace 上架，兼容 Word 和 PowerPoint。 这意味着Grok不再局限于聊天窗口，而是成为一个可以在办公软件内轻松访问的数据分析师。

该插件的使用逻辑非常贴近真实的办公场景：当用户在Excel中选择一个数据区域时，可以直接向Grok询问数据的变化、背后的原因以及要点。 Grok 的答案会清楚地引用相应的数据单元格，而不是凭空给出结论。 它还可以理解公式语法，执行计算平均值、排序和填充等常见编辑操作，并生成可一键插入工作表的图表。 换句话说，过去需要编写函数、拖动公式和手动绘制图表的任务现在只需与数据对话即可完成。

更重要的是，Grok 不仅仅关注表中选定的小数据。 通过连接器，它可以从电子邮件、SharePoint 或 Google Drive 中提取上下文信息，将分散的文档集成到当前的分析中。 这一能力使得基于Excel的问答不再是一座孤岛，而是可以结合电子邮件交流、团队文档和外部文件进行更全面的判断。 当 Grok 作为免费插件嵌入到 Word、PowerPoint 和 Excel 三者中时，办公软件和对话式 AI 之间的界限进一步模糊。
